creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
files have not changed in years.
I suspect a local problem.

send me a tar.gz of:
	distfiles/gnupg-idea/idea.c
	distfiles/gnupg-idea/rsa.c
	security/Makefile
	security/distinfo

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany


MD5 (gnupg-idea/rsa.c) = d8b6f26df0e3e0ccd93c2d0589d8766f
MD5 (gnupg-idea/idea.c) = 7d0557459e0a41da099ddbd837d4bd40

ls -l distfiles/gnupg-idea/*
-rw-r--r--  1 root  dm  15450 Sep  7  1999 distfiles/gnupg-idea/idea.c
-rw-r--r--  1 root  dm  14302 Sep  7  1999 distfiles/gnupg-idea/rsa.c

gnupg-idea# make
>> idea.c doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/gnupg-idea.

15450 bytes transferred in 2.0 seconds (7.46 kBps)

14302 bytes transferred in 1.9 seconds (7.45 kBps)

install -c -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /image/src/local/gnupg-idea/work/rsa /usr/local/lib/gnupg/rsa
